c_stdlib:

- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9

- '2'
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64

name: cwinpy

about.description:
A Python module for performing Bayesian inference for
continuous gravitational-wave signals from pulsars.

A Python module for performing Bayesian inference for
continuous gravitational-wave signals from pulsars.

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: cwinpy
  version: 1.5.0

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/${{ name[0] }}/${{ name }}/${{ name }}-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 43dbec0b97663111b37b68d7ad5042fb5fb8db9fdab6f825c814d6210788c3f6
  patches:
    # to update the patches for a new release:
    #
    #     # -- checkout the new source release tag
    #     cd /path/to/git/cwinpy
    #     git fetch
    #     git checkout <release-tag>
    #     # -- apply the patches on top of the release tag
    #     git am --3way /path/to/git/cwinpy-feedstock/recipe/patches/*.patch
    #     <resolve-any-conflicts>
    #     # -- render new patch files
    #     git format-patch <release-tag>
    #     # -- copy them back to the feedstock
    #     cd /path/to/git/cwinpy-feedstock
    #     git rm recipe/patches/*.patch
    #     cp /path/to/git/cwinpy/*.patch recipe/patches/
    #     git add recipe/patches/*.patch
    #     <update-this-file-as-required>

    # remove lalsuite requirement
    - patches/0001-Remove-lalsuite-Python-requirement.patch
    # patch test to survive no internet connection
    - patches/0002-Handle-no-internet-connection-in-test.patch

build:
  number: 0
  python:
    entry_points:
      - cwinpy_generate_summary_pages = cwinpy.pe.summary:generate_summary_pages_cli
      - cwinpy_heterodyne = cwinpy.heterodyne.heterodyne:heterodyne_cli
      - cwinpy_heterodyne_merge = cwinpy.heterodyne.heterodyne:heterodyne_merge_cli
      - cwinpy_heterodyne_pipeline = cwinpy.heterodyne.heterodyne:heterodyne_pipeline_cli
      - cwinpy_knope = cwinpy.knope.knope:knope_cli
      - cwinpy_knope_pipeline = cwinpy.knope.knope:knope_pipeline_cli
      - cwinpy_pe = cwinpy.pe.pe:pe_cli
      - cwinpy_pe_generate_pp_plots = cwinpy.pe.testing:generate_pp_plots
      - cwinpy_pe_pipeline = cwinpy.pe.pe:pe_pipeline_cli
      - cwinpy_skyshift_pipeline = cwinpy.knope.skyshift:skyshift_pipeline_cli
  script: ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv
  skip:
    - match(python, ">=3.14")
    - win

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ compiler("c") }}
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - cython >=3
        - numpy
        - python
  host:
    - cython >=3
    - numpy
    - pip
    - python
    - setuptools >=61
    - setuptools_scm >=6.2
  run:
    - appdirs
    - arby
    - astropy-base
    - bilby >=2.0.1
    - configargparse
    - corner >=2.2.1
    - gwosc >=0.5.4
    - gwpy >=2.1.1
    - healpy
    - lintegrate >=0.1.7
    - matplotlib-base >=3.6.0
    - numba >=0.5.0
    - numpy >=1.17.0
    - pesummary >=1.2.0
    - psrqpy >=1.1.7
    - python
    - python-htcondor >=10.0.0
    - python-lal >=7.2.2
    - python-lalframe >=2.0.3
    - python-lalpulsar >=5.0.2
    - requests
    - requests-pelican
    - scipy
    - simpleeval
    - solar_system_ephemerides >=1.0.0
  run_constraints:
    - if: match(python, "<=3.10")
      then: scipy <1.15.0a0

tests:
  - requirements:
      run:
        - cweqgen >=0.4.4
        - ephem >=3.7.7.1
        - git
        - httpretty
        - lalapps
        - pesummary >=1.3.2
        - pip
        - pyerfa
        - pytest >=4.6
        - pytest-astropy
        - pytest-socket
        - seaborn
        - if: not arm64
          then:
            - libstempo >=2.4.2
            - tempo2 =2025.02.1
    script:
      # Check metadata
      - python -m pip check
      # Run test suite (only native builds)
      - if: build_platform == target_platform
        then: python -m pytest --pyargs cwinpy.test -ra
      # Check entry points
      - cwinpy_generate_summary_pages --help
      - cwinpy_heterodyne --help
      - cwinpy_heterodyne_merge --help
      - cwinpy_heterodyne_pipeline --help
      - cwinpy_knope --help
      - cwinpy_knope_pipeline --help
      - cwinpy_pe --help
      - cwinpy_pe_generate_pp_plots --help
      - cwinpy_pe_pipeline --help
      - cwinpy_skyshift_pipeline --help

about:
  summary: CW Inference in Python
  description: |
    A Python module for performing Bayesian inference for
    continuous gravitational-wave signals from pulsars.
  homepage: https://github.com/cwinpy/cwinpy/
  repository: https://git.ligo.org/cwinpy/cwinpy
  documentation: https://cwinpy.readthedocs.io/
  license: MIT
  license_file: LICENSE

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - duncanmmacleod
    - mattpitkin
